issues.description: Missing 'Once Per Turn' restriction. Condition should include turn-count limiter or effects should specify frequency constraint.
AttachDon action should specify source as 'rested DON!!' cards (not generic attachment). Current DSL does not distinguish resting state of source DON.
Target scope incomplete. Must restrict to '[Monkey.D.Luffy]' character cards, not generic 'ChooseOwnCharacter'. Target should include character type filter.
Extraneous second effect with trigger:'Trigger' and PlaySelf action has no basis in card text. This effect should be removed entirely.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to 1 of your [Monkey.D.Luffy] cards.
